l2_sentences: The cat that the dog that the boy owned chased ran up the tree.
The report that the committee that the senator formed submitted was approved.
The book that the author that the publisher discovered wrote became a bestseller.
The house that the builder that the architect hired constructed won an award.
The car that the mechanic that the dealership employed fixed was sold quickly.
